# HPD.ML.DataSources.JsonDataHandle

- Package: `HPD-ML-DataSources` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Kind: `class`
- Guide: [Related documentation](../../../data/json.md)

Lazy IDataHandle backed by a JSON or JSONL file. Schema is inferred on construction. Data streams lazily.

```csharp
public sealed class JsonDataHandle : HPD.ML.Abstractions.IDataHandle
```
